title: The Invention Network | The Invention Game
kinitro
founder_pattern: The venture fits classic unicorn pattern recognition: 1) obsessive builders who release infrastructure code before marketing, 2) contrarian bet on fully-decentralised AI compute/storage, and 3) timing convergence around Bittensor’s rapid ecosystem expansion in 2025.
structural_advantage:
- Data Layer – Storb (Subnet 26).
• Storb’s README and SubnetAlpha profile describe a decentralised object-storage subnet that shards files with Reed–Solomon erasure coding, distributes pieces to miners, and uses Proof-of-Data-Possession challenges for integrity. Validators weight miners, and TAO rewards flow via on-chain incentives.
• Off-chain storage + on-chain incentives balance speed with verifiability. SQLite is used for metadata; network topology follows Bittensor’s 64 validators / 192 miners standard.
asymmetric_signal: Validators rank miners on latency (20 %), success (30 %) and PDP proof score (50 %), creating a quantitative reputation layer.
